blocks.text: Good. When the calls come through I will fold them into the perception map before the section hardens; if they slip past early next week I will hold the capital-story read as provisional rather than let it hold up the schedule.

I have pulled the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} analyst notes back to the start of last year, which is enough to tell whether the gap is recent or has been there all along, and the early answer is that it is not new. Michelle Rose, I will send you the full source list so Robert Smith can see exactly what the read is built on before any of it reaches him as a finding.
